summary: Phase 3 testing complete - Admin role with moderation capabilities, rate limiting, and regression testing. Backend: 42/42 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 9/10 tests passed (90%). All admin endpoints working correctly, rate limiting functional, existing candidate/employer flows still operational.

integration_issues.issue: Minor navigation issue when clicking job card in regression test - not related to Phase 3 admin features

passed_tests: Admin cannot self-register (403)
Admin login with admin@talentiv.id / admin123 succeeds
Disabled user cannot login (403 with 'Akun dinonaktifkan' message)
GET /api/admin/overview returns counts (users, companies, jobs, applications)
Non-admin (candidate) calling /api/admin/overview returns 403
Unauthenticated request to /api/admin/* returns 401
GET /api/admin/jobs returns jobs with company name enriched
GET /api/admin/jobs supports q and status filters
PUT /api/admin/jobs/{id} changes status and is_featured
DELETE /api/admin/jobs/{id} removes job
GET /api/admin/users returns users without password_hash
GET /api/admin/users supports q and role filters
PUT /api/admin/users/{id} disables user and changes role
GET /api/admin/companies returns companies with job_count
Rate limiting on /api/ai/parse-resume returns 429 after 5 requests
Regression: Candidate can apply to jobs
Regression: Candidate can save jobs
Regression: Candidate can update profile
Regression: Employer can create jobs
Regression: Employer can view applicants
Admin login redirects to /admin dashboard
Admin dashboard shows 4 stat cards (pengguna, perusahaan, lowongan, lamaran)
Admin dashboard shows user breakdown (candidates, employers, admins, disabled)
Admin dashboard shows job breakdown (published, paused, closed, featured)
Admin sidebar has 4 nav links (Dashboard, Lowongan, Pengguna, Perusahaan)
Header user dropdown for admin shows Shield icon
Header user dropdown shows 'Moderasi Lowongan', 'Kelola Pengguna', 'Kelola Perusahaan'
/admin/lowongan shows jobs with status dropdown, feature toggle, delete button
/admin/lowongan has search and status filter
/admin/pengguna shows users with role dropdown and disable toggle
/admin/pengguna has search and role filter
/admin/perusahaan shows companies with job_count badge
/admin/perusahaan has search
Candidate trying to access /admin redirects to /kandidat
Employer can access /employer dashboard
Employer can access job posting page

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - 1 minor navigation issue unrelated to Phase 3)
